content: By integrating multiple inconsistent perspective reflection mechanisms from LLM self-reflection research into the Self-Refine framework, we can create a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that preserves Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while fixing its limitation of single-perspective blind spots. This modified framework can generate higher quality outputs for tasks like code generation and reasoning by catching flaws that a single self-feedback perspective would miss.
